titleStmt.title: SII 9.449: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 449. (A.R. No. 417 of 1928.) ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PRAKARA.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1366, Raktākshi, Āshāḍha, śu. 10, Gu[ruvāra], corresponding to A.D. 1444 June 25 Thursday, in the reign of Dēvarāya-Mahārāya. It mentions Timmaṇṇa-Oḍeya as ruling over Bārakūra-rājya under his orders and records that the several Seṭṭikāras of Paḍuvakēri in Basarūru gave lands to Nāraṇa-Seṭṭi for offerings and service in the temple of Nakharēśvara. Nāraṇa-Seṭṭi is also stated to have made a gift of land to the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrīsarasvatyāyaṁ namaḥ śrīgurubhyōnamaḥ nirvigña
mastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavaruṣa 13
66 neya raktākṣisaṁvatsarada Āśāḍha śuddha 10 gu lū śrīmanmahārājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyaru vijayanaga
riya siṁhāsanadalli sāṁbrājyavanāḷutiha kāladali Avara nirūpadiṁ tiṁ
maṇaOḍeyaru bārakūrarājyavanu pālisuva kāladali basuṟūra paḍuva
kēriya halaru seṭṭikāṟaru Anyaṁṭara baḷiya saṁkaraseṭṭiya maga kuḍeya
ra baḷiya nāraṇaseṭṭige koṭṭa mūlaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare hārunāḍa kayima
ra Odare koṁgāḷiya beṭina bayalina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu Aṁṇaheggaḍeya
gaḍi kānūrana makkiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu telaūravara gaḍi ye
ttida Agaḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu . paḍuvalu bayicahaḍavaḷana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍa
lu . baḍagalu baḍābeṭiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeyiṁda Oḷagaṇa ba
yalu bittuva bede gaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalu muḍi 12 maneya bāgila gadde makki
saha bittuvadu muḍi 6 Aṁtu bayalu makki saha bittuvadu muḍi 18 Akṣāradalū ha
dineṁṭu mūḍe gadde mane hakkalu haḍu beṭṭumeṁdu mara phala nidhi nikṣēpa jala
pāśāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmike siddha sādhya yēnuḷḷaṁthādu sahitavāgi halaru seṭikā
ṟaru Ārdhdhaparichēdanavāgi koṁḍu mūlaparichēdanavāgi A nāraṇaseṭige dhārāpū
rvvakavāgi mūlavanu yeṟadu koṭaru �yo bāḷa mēle halaru seṭikāṟara haḍiya
lu kaṭṭikūṭṭa teṟu ¥ 2 modalu halaru seṭikāṟaru yiḷihikoḍuva jī
ta ga 4 hoṁnu yī yeraḍu haṇavina modala teṟina Oḷage yī nālku
hoṁna jītavanu yiḷihikoṭṭu mēlāda hoṁnanū koṁḍuhōharu �yo
hadineṁṭu mūḍe gaddeyamēle hoṟagaṇa Āppaṇe Uṁṭu yaṁdu baṁda
re halaru seṭṭikāṟaru tettu koḍuveveṁdu Oḍaṁbaṭṭu barasida śilāśāsana
�yo bāḷa mēle saṁkaraseṭṭiya maga nāraṇaseṭṭi māḍida dharmada vivara nakharēśvara
da śrīmahādēvara śāṁtidēva pūjeya māḍuva Aḍigaḷige naḍasikoḍuva bhatta nālvaṁ
ḍeyalu muḍi 27 kāṭiga 2 hoṁnu rudrapūje 1 kke bhatta muḍi 20 yī dhar(ṁ)mmava
nu Ā bāḷa mēle nāraṇaseṭṭi nāraṇaseṭṭiya kuṭuṁbadavaru Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyi
yāgi naḍasikoḍuveveṁdu Oḍaṁbaṭṭu barasida śāsana yī bāḷa mēle Ārobba
rū Ottu māḍidare halaru seṭṭikāṟaru nilisikoḍuvaru halaru seṭṭikāṟara
suhastada Oppa nakharēśvarada śrīmahādēvaru nāraṇaseṭṭiya suhastada Oppa
toṁbhattina huttirikeya brahmaru . dānapālanayōrmadhyē varaṁ dānaṁ na pāla
naṁ . dānāt svargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭirvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
yēkayika bhaginī lōkē sarvvēśāmapi bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōgyā na karagrāhyā
vipradattā vasuṁdharā . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrīśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.449 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
